description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit with a rectangular frame and three open shelves. The frame is composed of thick, light-colored vertical side panels, while the shelves themselves are a contrasting dark color, likely wood or laminate. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functional storage. The open front and back allow for easy access to items from either side, making it suitable for use as a room divider or against a wall. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage for books, decor, or urban essentials. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a hard, matte finish on all surfaces.
description: A modern, freestanding shelving unit with three open, dark shelves framed by thick, light-colored vertical panels. Its minimalist design offers accessible storage and a sturdy, clean-lined appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, light-colored vertical panels and the narrow profile of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three open, dark shelves framed by the light-colored sides, with no doors or handles visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the thick, light-colored vertical panels and narrow profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open backs of the three shelves, confirming the open-access design.
